name: @poseidon/workspace
description: Poseidon — Hydrogen Design System Figma copilot. Workspace root.

scripts.scan:components: echo 'Open Hydrogen DS in Figma + paperclip bridge, then run SCAN_COMPONENTS_PAYLOAD via figma_execute. See scripts/README.md.' && exit 1
scripts.scan:templates: echo 'Open Hydrogen DS in Figma + paperclip bridge, then run SCAN_TEMPLATES_PAYLOAD via figma_execute. See scripts/README.md.' && exit 1
scripts.scan:all: pnpm scan:tokens && pnpm scan:components && pnpm scan:templates
